title: Fluxie's Create's Style Phonos
description: Create mod's style retextures for the Phonos Mod
body:
# Fluxie's Create's Style Phonos
Create's Style Phonos like the name suggest retextures the Phonos mod in Create mod's Style.
Its useful for people that want more cohesive textures for their creations that mainly use stuff from Create mod.

For any [issues](https://github.com/StarFluxie/Create-s-Style-Phonos/issues) or [questions](https://github.com/StarFluxie/Create-s-Style-Phonos/discussions) please use [github](https://github.com/StarFluxie/Create-s-Style-Phonos).


#  <FONT COLOR="#ff0000"> **Warning** </FONT>
> **This Resource Pack is made for the version of the Phonos Mod that is not published on Modrinth!** 
> *Version A of the Resource Pack is for this Version of Phonos:*   
> You can download it from official Phonos mod's Github: https://github.com/FoundationGames/Phonos/releases/tag/v1.0.0-beta.11%2B1.20.1
>  
> *Version B of the Resource Pack is for this Version of Phonos forked by S'n'R team:*
[https://github.com/Layers-of-Railways/Phonos](https://github.com/Layers-of-Railways/Phonos)

## Credits
- this resource pack heavily bases on the [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) mod assets and palettes.


***
This resource pack was originally made for the Steam 'n' Rails Season 2 modpack.
